creator: kristinacors
caption: This travel hack is going to change the game for you when it comes to finding the business and first class award flights for your points! So many people don’t even know about this so watch until the end to learn how to use this life changing travel hack! #travelhacks #creditcardpoints #pointsandmiles #creditcardrewards #freetravelopportunities

transcription.text: This travel hack will get you free flights even in business and first-class and very few people know about this. By the way I'm Christina and I teach you how to travel luxury almost free. This hack is actually a tool called seats.arrow and it's completely free to use. Seats.arrow is basically like Google for flights you can book with points. So normally when you search for award flights, you have to type in one route and one date at a time on different airline websites, which can take forever. But seats.arrow lets you scan all available flights over several months and across entire regions in one search. So you can quickly see things like all flights to Asia using points or even live flat business seats around the world. Now the difference between this and point me, which I talked about in the video before this one, is point me is best when you already know the exact date and trip you want to book. Seats.arrow is better when you're flexible with your dates and routes and want to hunt for the best deals you can book with points. Share this with your travel buddy and follow this series for travel hacks no one teaches you.
